name: obikai
description: Obikai — dojo-native, open-source (AGPLv3) SaaS for martial-arts schools. Multi-tenant hosted + single-tenant self-host from one codebase.

pnpm.comment: overrides = security pins for transitive deps (Dependabot/Trivy), drop once upstreams ship fixes. onlyBuiltDependencies = deny-by-default install-script allowlist (ADR-0028): ONLY these may run pre/install/postinstall; every other dependency's lifecycle scripts are blocked, neutralising the npm-install backdoor vector. Keep minimal — add a package ONLY if a clean install fails without its native build step.
